summary: Parses an encoded parameter string into a key-value mapping according to configurable delimiter, decoding, charset, null, and array-handling rules.
signature_intent: Input is a string plus parsing settings; output is an object mapping decoded keys to decoded values.
behavior: Optionally removes a leading question mark before parsing.
Splits the input using the configured delimiter and optional maximum parameter count.
Can detect an encoding marker and use it to choose between UTF-8 and ISO-8859-1 decoding.
Skips the encoding marker entry when producing output.
Decodes each key and value with the selected charset.
Treats entries without an equals sign as null when strict null handling is enabled, otherwise as an empty string.
Combines repeated keys into aggregated values.
Interprets numeric character entities for ISO-8859-1 values when enabled.
Preserves explicit array-style assignments according to the configured array parsing behavior.
edge_cases: An unlimited parameter count parses all entries.
A missing value separator produces a key with a null or empty-string value.
Repeated keys do not overwrite earlier values.
The encoding marker affects only entries parsed after detection.
Array-style syntax can wrap parsed array values to preserve nesting.
